framework.name: next
notes: App Router confirmed via app/ directory structure
Server Actions in use (use server directives detected)

componentLibrary.name: shadcn
notes: Radix UI primitives used directly in several components

animation.name: motion
notes: useReducedMotion not yet in use — recommend adding
No spring presets defined — recommend extracting to lib/spring.ts
zodResolver used in all form instances
Suspense not yet adopted — queries use isPending pattern
aria-hidden used consistently on decorative icons

existingComponents.notes: No exit animation — AnimatePresence not wired in
Uniform card for all metric types — candidate for polymorphic refactor
Mixed item types rendered as identical rows — polymorphic opportunity

designGaps.issue: Polymorphic content rendered as uniform cards
designGaps.recommendation: Implement discriminated union renderer: InviteRow, CommitRow, AlertRow each with distinct visual treatment

designGaps.issue: Dialog has no exit animation — unmounts instantly
designGaps.recommendation: Wrap AnimatePresence around conditional portal content; add slide-up spring

designGaps.issue: No semantic content-hierarchy tokens (content-1, content-2, content-3)
designGaps.recommendation: Add --color-content-* tokens mapped to gray scale steps 12, 11, 9
Add useReducedMotion() check to all AnimatePresence and motion components

designGaps.issue: Skeleton has no aria-busy on container
designGaps.recommendation: Add aria-busy='true' aria-label='Loading...' to skeleton wrapper

designGaps.issue: No aria-invalid or aria-describedby when in error state
designGaps.recommendation: Add aria-invalid={!!error} and aria-describedby pointing to error message

polymorphicTargets: search-results.tsx — user/project/file types, currently uniform cards
missingPatterns: AsyncState<T> pattern — no empty/error/loading state management convention
Spring presets — no shared motion vocabulary across components
CVA adoption — button uses CVA but other multi-variant components do not
priorityWork: 1. Add AnimatePresence to Dialog (high impact, low effort)
2. Refactor activity-feed.tsx to polymorphic renderer (high impact, medium effort)
3. Add semantic content tokens to globals.css (medium impact, low effort)
4. Audit all forms for ARIA completeness (medium impact, medium effort)
